verses.text: 'Behold, what manner of love' — that we be called 'the sons of God'; we shall be like Him, and 'every man that hath this hope... purifieth himself.' Loved sons. The hope of glory makes us pure.
'Behold, what manner of love' — that we be called 'the sons of God'; we shall be like Him, and 'every man that hath this hope... purifieth himself.' Loved sons. The hope of glory makes us pure.
'Behold, what manner of love' — that we be called 'the sons of God'; we shall be like Him, and 'every man that hath this hope... purifieth himself.' Loved sons. The hope of glory makes us pure.
Sin is transgression of the law; He was manifested 'to take away our sins,' and whoever abides in Him sins not. Sin removed. Christ came to end our sinning.
Sin is transgression of the law; He was manifested 'to take away our sins,' and whoever abides in Him sins not. Sin removed. Christ came to end our sinning.
Sin is transgression of the law; He was manifested 'to take away our sins,' and whoever abides in Him sins not. Sin removed. Christ came to end our sinning.
He that does righteousness is righteous; 'he that committeth sin is of the devil,' but Christ came 'to destroy the works of the devil.' Two seeds. The born-again do not live in sin.
He that does righteousness is righteous; 'he that committeth sin is of the devil,' but Christ came 'to destroy the works of the devil.' Two seeds. The born-again do not live in sin.
He that does righteousness is righteous; 'he that committeth sin is of the devil,' but Christ came 'to destroy the works of the devil.' Two seeds. The born-again do not live in sin.
The children of God and the devil are known by this: he that loves not his brother is not of God, as Cain was. Loveless Cain. Hatred betrays a child of the devil.

The children of God and the devil are known by this: he that loves not his brother is not of God, as Cain was. Loveless Cain. Hatred betrays a child of the devil.
Marvel not if the world hate you; 'we have passed from death unto life, because we love'; 'whosoever hateth his brother is a murderer.' Love is life. Love proves we have crossed into life.
Marvel not if the world hate you; 'we have passed from death unto life, because we love'; 'whosoever hateth his brother is a murderer.' Love is life. Love proves we have crossed into life.
Marvel not if the world hate you; 'we have passed from death unto life, because we love'; 'whosoever hateth his brother is a murderer.' Love is life. Love proves we have crossed into life.
Hereby we know love, that He 'laid down his life for us'; let us love 'not in word... but in deed and in truth.' Real love. True love gives, as Christ gave Himself.
Hereby we know love, that He 'laid down his life for us'; let us love 'not in word... but in deed and in truth.' Real love. True love gives, as Christ gave Himself.
Hereby we know love, that He 'laid down his life for us'; let us love 'not in word... but in deed and in truth.' Real love. True love gives, as Christ gave Himself.
Hereby we assure our hearts; if our heart condemn us, 'God is greater than our heart.' Quieted heart. God's mercy outweighs our self-accusing.

Hereby we assure our hearts; if our heart condemn us, 'God is greater than our heart.' Quieted heart. God's mercy outweighs our self-accusing.
We receive what we ask, keeping His commandments; His commandment is to believe and love; He abides in us 'by the Spirit.' Abiding. Faith, love, and the Spirit mark His presence.
